component.name: Cider
component.summary: An exquisitely crafted and customizable Apple Music app

description.p: Cider. An exquisitely crafted and customizable Apple Music app with features such as Discord and Last.fm/Libre.fm/Maloja/ListenBrainz integration, Atmos Support (Binaural), Crossfade, Automix, Themes, Plugins, and so much more.

Initial release of Cider 4 on Flathub, bringing an exquisitely crafted desktop client for Apple Music. This version introduces performance improvements, high-quality audio features, Discord Rich Presence, and a customizable theme and extension ecosystem.
